channel.title: defluenced on Unkle Bonehead
channel.description: Recent content in defluenced on Unkle Bonehead

item.title: SEC vs XRP: Judgement S2ep21
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: Today Allen & Unkle B talk about the recent judgement handed down on the SEC vs XRP case

item.title: Web3 Missed It! Maybe. S2Ep20
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: Today Allen Taylor & Unkle Bonehead discuss Threads and how Web3 missed a great chance for adoption.

item.title: Social Tokens: Who, What & Why? S2Ep19
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: Today Allen & Unkle Bonehead discus Social Tokens. What they are, who they are for, how to create them & why someone would want one.

item.title: The War on Crypto S2Ep18
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: Allen & Unkle Bonehead discuss the recent lawsuits filed by the SEC against Binance and Coinbase.

item.title: Riding the Waves on Ecency's Decks 2.0! S2Ep17
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: Ecency released a major update earlier this week and it’s probably the best they’ve ever done.

item.title: Whats next for Dbuzz? S2Ep15
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: The Dbuzz proposal on Hive passed within a week of its drop. So we got @nathansenn on to talk about it and whats going to happen with Dbuzz and what to expect over the length of the proposal. It’s exciting and you dont want to miss this interview.

item.title: What is the form of a perfect internet? S2Ep13
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: Today’s episode was spurred, as usual, by the Cryptocracy newsletter. One of the stories Allen reported on was about what is the perfect internet? So that’s what Allen & I riffed about.

item.title: Paragraph, Unicorns & AI, OhMy! S2Ep12
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: Allen & I talk about the moving of the Cryptocracy newletter to Paragraph from Substack. Why he did it and the multiple benefits for both him and the readers.

item.title: User Generated Content S2Ep11
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: This is a solo episode from Allen. He gives you a free chapter of his newest book talking about User Generated Content.

item.title: Hanging with Kencode DefluencedPodcast S2Ep10
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: Today we got to hang out with @kencode, one of the developers of the Hive-Tube plugin and the master mind behind CastGarden

item.title: A Whole Lotta News S2Ep09
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: This episode is slightly different than normal. We recorded this live and it worked pretty good.

item.title: 3Speaks Wiring Diagram S2Ep06
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: 3Speak has made a post detailing an overview of their new Acela Core.

item.title: The Deaths of Coil & Rally S2Ep05
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: Coil has announced that they are shutting down. Interledger will still be going and we hope that someone will step in and take over where Coil left off.

item.title: The Latest Buzz about DBuzz S2Ep04
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: This week Allen & I sat down with Nathansenn & Chrisrice to talk about Dbuzz. https://d.buzz

item.title: How to Fix Stephen Crowder's Problem S2Ep03
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: In a bombshell of an episode of Louder with Crowder Steven literally nuked big Conservative media…

item.title: Aureal's Big Announcement S2Ep01
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: The podcast app Aureal has announced a partnership with Unstoppable Domains in their discord server.

item.title: Cent Pages S1Ep14
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: Here’s another solo episode by Allen. Today he talks about Cent Pages.

item.title: 10 Thing's Allen Likes About Read dot Cast S1Ep13
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: In this episode Unkle Bonehead is still out with no microphone so Allen is flying solo again.

item.title: PublishOx S1Ep12
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: In this episode Allen is flying solo.

item.title: Secure your keys S1Ep11
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: We had an issue where I (Unkle Bonehead) lost the keys for the Defluenced Hive account.

item.title: Web3 Wednesday, LBRY Lost S1Ep10
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: Here in Episode 10 we cover the big news that LBRY lost it’s suit with the SEC!

item.title: When FTX fails Decentralization Wins. S1E09
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: We talk about the recent blowup of FTX and why it could be a good thing for Cryptosocial.

item.title: Twitter Migration: Rise of the Fediverse S1Ep08
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: In case you’ve been living under a rock. Elon Musk completed the deal and now owns Twitter.

item.title: Web3 Idenitity Crisis Pt3S1Ep07
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: This week we finish our discussion of Web3’s Identity Crisis

item.title: Web3 Identity Crisis Pt2 S1Ep06
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: This week we continue our discussion of Web3’s Identity Crisis

item.title: Web3 Identity Crisis: Pt1 S1E05
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: There is so much to unpack in this article that this is going to end up being a series.

item.title: Platform Review: hive S1Ep04
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: Today we do our first platform review and it is what we consider to be the best Cryptosocial platform currently available.

item.title: What is Decentralization & Why is it needed? S1Ep03
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: In this episode Allan and I talk about what decentralization means to us. What we think it should be and how it empowers the individual.

item.title: Why Cryptosocial Networks are Needed S1Ep02
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: In this episode we are going to go over the criteria and expectations that we think should be included in a Cryptosocial media platform. What we think you should look for in a social media home.

item.title: An Interview with Us S1ep01
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: People get banned from social media. Because they dont tow the line and big tech answers to no one. They are in control. Whether it’s left or right. If the platform has a TOS that states they can delete your account. Then you should expect it to happen at any time for any reason. Those kinds of terms means you are only ok with the current operators of the service. Until you do or say something that reflects bad on their real customers, the advertisers. Because you know they cant sell bad product (you)  to their customers. Watch on CastGarden
